channel.title: NIST News
channel.description: National Institute of Standards and Technology news

item.title: NIST Awards $15 Million for Quantum Computing Research
item.dc:subject: Quantum
CHIPS
item.description: NIST announced $15 million in new grants for quantum computing research at five universities under the CHIPS and Science Act.

item.title: NIST Releases Updated Cybersecurity Framework
item.dc:subject: Cybersecurity
item.description: Version 2.0 of the NIST Cybersecurity Framework includes new guidance for supply chain risk management and AI systems.

item.title: NIST and Industry Partners Demonstrate Chip Packaging Breakthrough
item.dc:subject: Semiconductors
CHIPS
item.description: NIST researchers in collaboration with Intel and AMD demonstrated a new advanced chip packaging technique that could reduce costs by 30%.
